Package recoder.service

Interface ByteCodeInfo

All Superinterfaces:
ProgramModelInfo, Service
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultByteCodeInfo
public interface ByteCodeInfo extends ProgramModelInfo
Implements queries for program model elements with bytecode representations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Type
    getAnnotationType(AnnotationUseInfo au)
    Returns the (annotation) type of the given annotation use.

    getClassFile(ClassType ct)
    Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given classtype.

    Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given constructor.

    Methods inherited from interface recoder.service.ProgramModelInfo

    filterApplicableMethods, filterMostSpecificMethods, filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase2, filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase3, getAllFields, getAllMethods, getAllSubtypes, getAllSupertypes, getAllTypes, getBoxedType, getClassTypeContainer, getConstructors, getConstructors, getContainingClassType, getExceptions, getFields, getMethods, getMethods, getMethods, getMethods, getPackage, getPromotedType, getReturnType, getSignature, getSubtypes, getSupertypes, getType, getTypes, getUnboxedType, isCompatibleSignature, isCompatibleSignature, isSubtype, isSupertype, isVisibleFor, isWidening, isWidening, isWidening, isWidening

  • Method Details

    • register

      void register(ClassFile cf)
      Registers a new class file for the service.
      Parameters:
      cf - the new class file.

    • getClassFile

      ClassFile getClassFile(ClassType ct)
      Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given classtype. Returns null, if the given type is not a class file.
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      the - corresponding class file, or null, if the given type has no bytecode representation.

    • getMethodInfo

      MethodInfo getMethodInfo(Method m)
      Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given method. Returns null , if the given method is not a method info.
      Parameters:
      m - a method.
      the - corresponding bytecode element, or null, if the given method has no bytecode representation.

    • getConstructorInfo

      ConstructorInfo getConstructorInfo(Constructor c)
      Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given constructor. Returns null, if the given constructor is not a constructor info.
      Parameters:
      c - a constructor.
      the - corresponding bytecode element, or null, if the given constructor has no bytecode representation.

    • getFieldInfo

      FieldInfo getFieldInfo(Field f)
      Returns the bytecode counterpart of the given field. Returns null , if the given field is not a field info.
      Parameters:
      f - a field.
      the - corresponding field info, or null, if the given field has no bytecode representation.

    • getAnnotationType

      Type getAnnotationType(AnnotationUseInfo au)
      Returns the (annotation) type of the given annotation use.
      Parameters:
      au - an annotation use
      Returns:
      the type of the referenced annotation type
